---
title: "Day 4 — Knowledge Transfer Tools"
subtitle: "Thursday 18 June 2026"
---

## Theme

*Producing concrete tools and guidance for the wider research community*

Day 4 shifts from analysis to dissemination. Participants form writing and coding teams to produce vignettes with worked code examples, and begin drafting the "Ten Simple Rules for SA–IDM Integration."

---

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Introduce "Ten Simple Rules" concept · Brainstorm rules · Form writing and coding teams |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Begin vignette development in mixed groups · Document code examples · Write draft rules |
| 12:00–12:30 | **Keynote:** SA perspective — case studies illustrating challenges and areas for collaboration |
| 12:30–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | Continue vignette development |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Review and discuss draft Ten Simple Rules |

---

## Learning Objectives

By the end of Day 4, participants will be able to:

1. Identify the most compelling SA–IDM integration examples from the case studies
2. Contribute to a vignette documenting a cross-disciplinary analytical approach with annotated code
3. Propose and justify at least two of the Ten Simple Rules for SA–IDM integration

---

## Vignettes

Vignettes document different analytical approaches to the same case study problem, complete with:

- Scientific motivation and methodological background
- Step-by-step code in R (and optionally Python)
- Results, interpretation, and discussion of limitations

Groups select the most informative cross-disciplinary examples from their work on Days 2–3 and develop these into standalone, reproducible documents.

*Completed vignettes will be posted here after the workshop*

---

## Ten Simple Rules

The "Ten Simple Rules for SA–IDM Integration" document provides practical, actionable guidance for researchers in either field who want to apply methods from the other. It is modelled on the *PLOS Computational Biology* Ten Simple Rules series.

### Draft Rules (to be refined on Day 5)

*Rules will be posted here as they are developed*

---

## Materials

### Keynote Slides (SA Perspective)

*To be posted after the workshop*

### Draft Vignettes

*Links will appear here as groups share their drafts*

### Ten Simple Rules — Working Document

*Working draft will be linked here*
